'''âs-g-ch''' ('''kasagach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queek|queek]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queek|queek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-g-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kasagach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisagach|thisagach]] || [[word:jisagach|jisagach]] || [[word:shisagach|shisagach]] || [[word:kisagach|kisagach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusagach|thuthusagach]] || [[word:jujusagach|jujusagach]] || [[word:shushusagach|shushusagach]] || [[word:kukusagach|kukusagach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusagach|thusagach]] || [[word:jusagach|jusagach]] || [[word:shusagach|shusagach]] || [[word:kusagach|kusagach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusagach|thusagach]] || [[word:jusagach|jusagach]] || [[word:shusagach|shusagach]] || [[word:kusagach|kusagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesagach|thesagach]] || [[word:jesagach|jesagach]] || [[word:shesagach|shesagach]] || [[word:kesagach|kesagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosagach|thothosagach]] || [[word:jojosagach|jojosagach]] || [[word:shoshosagach|shoshosagach]] || [[word:kokosagach|kokosagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosagach|thosagach]] || [[word:josagach|josagach]] || [[word:shosagach|shosagach]] || [[word:kosagach|kosagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosagach|thosagach]] || [[word:josagach|josagach]] || [[word:shosagach|shosagach]] || [[word:kosagach|kosagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsagach|thĂŠsagach]] || [[word:jĂŠsagach|jĂŠsagach]] || [[word:shĂŠsagach|shĂŠsagach]] || [[word:kĂŠsagach|kĂŠsagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasagach|thathasagach]] || [[word:jajasagach|jajasagach]] || [[word:shashasagach|shashasagach]] || [[word:kakasagach|kakasagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasagach|thasagach]] || [[word:jasagach|jasagach]] || [[word:shasagach|shasagach]] || [[word:kasagach|kasagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasagach|thasagach]] || [[word:jasagach|jasagach]] || [[word:shasagach|shasagach]] || [[word:kasagach|kasagach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasagach|shasagach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasagach|goshasagach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasagach|gokishasagach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasagachnĂŒ|shasagachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasagachnknĂŒ|goshasagachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasagachnĂŒ|gokishasagachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasagachshĂ«|shasagachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasagachnkshĂ«|goshasagachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasagachshĂ«|gokishasagachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasagachro|shasagachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasagachnkro|goshasagachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasagachro|gokishasagachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasagachmu|shasagachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasagachnkmu|goshasagachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasagachmu|gokishasagachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasagachsher|shasagachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasagachnksher|goshasagachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasagachsher|gokishasagachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasagachng|shasagachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasagachnkng|goshasagachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasagachng|gokishasagachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasagachya|shasagachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasagachnkya|goshasagachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasagachya|gokishasagachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasagachyam|shasagachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasagachnkyam|goshasagachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasagachyam|gokishasagachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasagachnĂŒshĂ«|shasagachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasagachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasagachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasagachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasagachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasagachnĂŒro|shasagachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasagachnknĂŒro|goshasagachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasagachnĂŒro|gokishasagachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasagachnĂŒmu|shasagachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasagachnknĂŒmu|goshasagachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasagachnĂŒmu|gokishasagachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasagachshĂ«nĂŒ|shasagachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasagachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasagachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasagachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasagachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasagachshĂ«ro|shasagachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasagachnkshĂ«ro|goshasagachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasagachshĂ«ro|gokishasagachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasagachshĂ«mu|shasagachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasagachnkshĂ«mu|goshasagachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasagachshĂ«mu|gokishasagachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasagachronĂŒ|shasagachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasagachnkronĂŒ|goshasagachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasagachronĂŒ|gokishasagachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasagachroshĂ«|shasagachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasagachnkroshĂ«|goshasagachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasagachroshĂ«|gokishasagachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasagachromu|shasagachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasagachnkromu|goshasagachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasagachromu|gokishasagachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasagachmunĂŒ|shasagachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasagachnkmunĂŒ|goshasagachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasagachmunĂŒ|gokishasagachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasagachmushĂ«|shasagachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasagachnkmushĂ«|goshasagachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasagachmushĂ«|gokishasagachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasagachmuro|shasagachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasagachnkmuro|goshasagachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasagachmuro|gokishasagachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
